title: Daanbantayan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Daanbantayan with a Z-Score of +4.26. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Daanbantayan is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 64%, while the wind speed is moderate at 16.1 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the population.
